info.general: <alx> is a stylish laptop bag with a bold black damask pattern on a beige background.
info.color: Beige with black damask design and brown trim
info.pattern: Damask pattern with large, ornate floral motifs
info.distinct features: Elegant damask pattern, dual top handles, and a detachable shoulder strap

info.general: <ash> is a stylish tote bag with bold wavy black stripes on a cream background and brown leather accents.
info.material: Canvas with leather handles and trim
info.color: Cream with black stripes and brown leather
info.distinct features: Wavy stripe pattern instead of straight lines, contrasting brown leather handles and trim

info.general: <bkq> is a small, light blue crossbody bag with a minimalist design and gold-tone hardware.
info.distinct features: Minimalist design with a single strap and gold-tone buckle hardware

info.general: <bxa> is a designer backpack with a classic monogram pattern and adjustable straps.
info.pattern: Monogram pattern with repeating logos and floral motifs
info.distinct features: Iconic monogram pattern, dual adjustable shoulder straps, top handle, and gold-tone hardware

info.general: <dbi> is a compact, rectangular yellow bag with black zipper and strap details.
info.distinct features: Bold yellow color with contrasting black zipper and strap, suggesting a utilitarian or sporty design

info.general: <dcw> is a textured brown leather handbag with contrasting yellow stitching and a gold zipper.
info.distinct features: Peppered leather texture, contrasting yellow stitching, gold zipper

info.general: <efd> is a purple gift bag with a golden rose emblem and ornate swirl pattern.
info.color: Purple with gold and white accents
info.pattern: Ornate white swirl pattern behind a golden rose
info.distinct features: The combination of the golden rose emblem, 24K branding, and intricate swirl pattern gives it a luxurious and distinctive appearance.

info.general: <fhe> is a brown paper gift bag adorned with a black floral pattern and natural fiber handles.
info.pattern: Floral pattern with vines and blossoms
info.distinct features: Natural fiber handles and intricate black floral print on brown paper

info.general: <foi> is a hand-embroidered fabric pouch with vibrant floral patterns and a chain strap.
info.color: Tan base with pink, blue, and orange embroidery
info.pattern: Floral embroidery with vines and blossoms
info.distinct features: Vibrant, hand-embroidered floral design and a decorative chain strap

info.general: <fzn> is a glamorous clutch bag entirely covered in sparkling beads and pearls with a gold-tone handle and clasp.
info.pattern: None, but fully covered in uniform beadwork
info.distinct features: Entirely encrusted with beads and pearls, giving it a luxurious, high-shine appearance

info.general: <koh> is a black textured tote bag with university branding.
info.brand/text: Purdue Federal Credit Union and Purdue The Graduate School
info.distinct features: Prominent university branding and textured surface

info.general: <ngp> is a compact, tan-colored leather wallet with a distinctive woven texture.
info.distinct features: The woven texture is the most distinguishing feature, giving it a unique, artisanal appearance.

info.general: <nyp> is a blush pink mini backpack with gold-tone hardware and a detachable chain strap.
info.distinct features: Detachable gold chain strap and attached small pouch

info.general: <pfa> is a structured handbag with a metallic rose gold frame and handle.
info.material: Leather or faux leather with metallic hardware
info.distinct features: Prominent rose gold metal frame and handle attachment, giving it a modern, architectural look

info.general: <ply> is a structured red handbag with a pebbled leather texture and gold-tone hardware.
info.distinct features: Pebbled leather texture and gold-tone hardware on handles and strap attachments

info.general: <pzm> is a gray, structured backpack with a minimalist design and a small, square brand patch on the front.
info.brand/text: Small square patch with a logo
info.distinct features: Minimalist aesthetic with clean lines and a subtle brand patch

info.general: <qnv> is a black textured leather handbag with gold-tone hardware and a woven pattern on the top flap.
info.pattern: Woven texture on the top flap
info.distinct features: Woven texture on the top flap and gold-tone hardware

info.general: <rqa> is a black tote bag with the word 'Google' printed in white.
info.distinct features: Prominent branding with the Google logo

info.general: <sng> is a plain white paper bag with wire handles resting on a surface next to blinds.
info.shape: Rectangular with a tapered bottom and folded top
info.distinct features: Wire handles and visible creases from folding

info.general: <srf> is a black backpack with a mesh back panel and adjustable straps.
info.distinct features: Mesh back panel for ventilation and adjustable straps with plastic buckles

info.general: <sue> is a light beige, semi-circular crossbody bag with gold-tone hardware and a contrasting black trim.
info.color: Light beige with black trim and gold-tone hardware
info.distinct features: Semi-circular design, contrasting black trim along the edge, gold-tone hardware on zipper and strap buckle

info.general: <tvb> is a bright red paper shopping bag hanging on a black surface.
info.distinct features: The bag is hanging vertically and appears to be empty, with its handles visible at the bottom.

info.general: <ukm> is a rectangular clutch bag with a textured, glittery gold and white embellished top half and a smooth tan suede bottom half.
info.distinct features: Combination of suede and glittery embellishment, asymmetrical two-tone design

info.general: <ydi> is a two-toned tote bag with 'amazon style' branding.
info.distinct features: Bold color-block design with black straps and prominent brand text

info.general: <zwr> is a black backpack with red branding and a distinctive red maple leaf logo.
info.brand/text: Red text 'Lowe Alpine' and a red maple leaf logo
info.distinct features: Red maple leaf logo and red branding text

info.general: <bpw> is an open book with a bright yellow cover and bold blue typography.
info.color: Yellow cover with blue and white text
info.brand/text: MAKE TIME, JOHN SNAP, HOW TO FOCUS ON WHAT MATTERS EVERY DAY
info.distinct features: Vivid yellow cover and large, stylized blue title text

info.general: <cup> is a worn paperback book with a torn cover and visible text.
info.color: Black cover with gold and white text
info.brand/text: Marian Stewart, LAST LOOK, NEW YORK TIMES BESTSELLING AUTHOR OF FINAL TRUTH
info.distinct features: Torn cover revealing the inner pages and text

info.general: <djk> is a book titled 'Data Structures Through C Language' with a distinctive cover design featuring a stylized abstract graphic.
info.brand/text: Data Structures Through C Language, BPP Publications
info.distinct features: Cover features a unique abstract graphic resembling a stylized 'S' or a stack of elements, and the title is prominently displayed in bold, angled text.

info.general: <exf> is a classic composition book with a speckled cover and visible branding.
info.material: Paper cover with a hardback binding
info.pattern: Speckled pattern with white dots on a dark blue background
info.brand/text: Composition Book, 100 Sheets, by 'The Paper Mate' brand
info.distinct features: The speckled cover design and the visible 'Composition Book' label make it uniquely identifiable as a classic school notebook.

info.general: <hqi> is a book titled 'Designing with Objects' by Avinash C. Kak, published by Wiley.
info.color: Dark purple cover with white text
info.brand/text: Wiley, Avinash C. Kak, DESIGNING WITH OBJECTS
info.distinct features: The title and author are prominently displayed on both the front and spine, and the cover features a colorful abstract image.
